parties.name: BRADY, ALEXANDRIA PAULA 145 TAYLOR STREET, #403 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Petitioner: Alexandria P. Brady, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Myles Alexander Brady, and gender changed from Female to Male.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-04-2006 Reset To May-09-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: L. Bura/Sajja, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Petitioner: Alexandria Paula Brady, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Matter is continued to May 9, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for Petitioner to obtain a proof of Medical Certificate under penalty of perjury.
